redaction_policy: no sk- prefixes, no Authorization: headers, no JWT-shaped tokens, no hex blobs >= 32 chars; all request_ids and run_ids use the [redacted-synthetic] literal; content_text is synthetic JSON payloads, never live model output
notes: Cluster M3-4: offline vertical acceptance fixture set.

These recordings are SYNTHETIC. They were NOT captured from a real MiniMax-M3 call. They carry plausible JSON shapes that the model-backed services can validate against _SpecificationSchema, _PlanPayload, _ImplementationPayload, _ReviewPayload.

M3-5 (live MiniMax-M3 vertical acceptance) replaces this manifest with a sibling at tests/fixtures/minimax_m3_recordings_live/manifest.json with recording_kind='live_recording'. The offline test prefers the live manifest when present.
Re-run: any modification to a recording file MUST bump this manifest's sha256 entry for that call AND add a migration note explaining the drift.
